name: Butterscotch Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in the brown sugar and allow to cool.
3. Add the eggs and stir until well combined.
4. Mix in the remaining ingredients, including sifted flour, baking powder, chopped nuts, salt, and vanilla.
5. Spread the mixture evenly into a 13 x 9-inch pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for about 30 minutes.
7. The bars may appear soft when removed from the oven; they will firm up as they cool.
8. Cut into sticks measuring approximately 2 inches by 1/2 inch while still warm, if desired.
9. Optionally, roll the cooled bars in powdered sugar.
